name: Mediterranean Style Rosemary Chicken Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, peeled, cut into small cubes
1 pound chicken, boneless & skinless, cut into small chunks
3 carrots, peeled, cut into 1/2 inch rounds
2 tablespoons fresh basil, torn into large pieces (or 1 tablespoon dried)
12 to 14 black olives, pitted and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pot, cover potatoes with water and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Drain the potatoes in a colander.
2. In a 2-3 quart pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add chicken and continue sautéing for approximately 5 minutes, until opaque.
4. Stir in water, carrots, lemon juice, rosemary, basil, parsley, and olives.
5. Simmer the stew on stovetop for about 25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. Turn off heat and serve.
